amazonListingFocus: full connectivity for notebook, console and mobile workflows

sizeOverrideHints.cameraDistance: Use wider composition to show screen scale, thin bezels and the large stand.
sizeOverrideHints.uiScale: Keep UI scale slightly smaller so the 16-inch panel area still feels spacious.
sizeOverrideHints.copyDensity: Allow more comparison copy because the 16-inch product is positioned as a premium productivity and gaming model.

summary.title: LuminaDisplay 16-inch Amazon Scene Preview
summary.subtitle: 3D listing scenes derived from product config, scenario overrides and Amazon asset planning.
focus: full connectivity for notebook, console and mobile workflows

videoStoryboard: 0-03s: pure-white hero opener with the 16-inch front view and a single line headline.
03-07s: rotate to the angled premium build shot and highlight metal body plus stand.
07-12s: transition into the office dual-screen setup showing 16:10 workspace density.
12-17s: switch to the gaming desk and emphasize 144Hz energy with bright contrast.
17-21s: move into the travel cafe setup to sell portability and slimness.
21-25s: isolate the side profile and sweep through Mini HDMI, dual USB-C and audio.
25-30s: return to hero framing and close on the LuminaDisplay bezel branding.

scenes.label: IMG-01 主图 Hero
scenes.objective: 突出 16 英寸大屏、16:10 比例、金属机身与大支架，同时保持主图合规。
scenes.headline: 16-inch 2.5K Portable Monitor
scenes.subheadline: Pure-white hero frame. No copy. No props. Ready for Amazon main image.
copyLines: Hero image only. Keep text off the rendered canvas.
Use subtle bloom on the screen, not on the bezel.
renderHints: 顶光和前方柔光同时开，保证边框边缘干净。
屏幕亮度不要压过边框高光。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon main image
Primary request: create a photorealistic 3D hero render for a 16-inch portable monitor listing
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background
Subject: black 16-inch portable monitor with a large integrated stand, slim 12mm metal body, thin bezels and a centered LuminaDisplay brand mark on the lower bezel
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D product render
Composition/framing: front-facing hero shot with a slight 5-degree top-down camera angle; product fills about 88% of the frame; show the full product only once
Lighting/mood: clean high-key studio lighting with soft reflections and crisp edge definition
Color palette: white background, black metal body, cool blue-gray screen glow
Materials/textures: CNC aluminum alloy with subtle brushed-metal reflections; glossy but controlled IPS panel surface
Text (verbatim): ""
Constraints: main-image compliant; no props; no cables; no callout text; no watermark; show only the sold product
Avoid: illustration look, fake floating accessories, extreme perspective distortion, overexposed screen

scenes.label: IMG-02 金属机身与大支架
scenes.objective: 强调 CNC 铝合金、12mm 轻薄和大支架结构，建立高级感。
scenes.headline: CNC Aluminum Body
copyLines: 金属高光要细，不要做成镜面不锈钢。
支架需要看起来稳，而不是轻飘。
renderHints: 区域光沿着机身侧边扫过，强化 12mm 厚度。
背部轮廓光略强于正面。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon feature image
Primary request: create a premium 3D feature render highlighting the slim metal body and large stand of a 16-inch portable monitor
Scene/backdrop: soft light-gray gradient studio backdrop with room for text on the right
Subject: black CNC aluminum portable monitor angled at 45 degrees with the stand deployed
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D advertising render
Composition/framing: product on the left side, large stand clearly visible, right side reserved for feature text
Lighting/mood: premium showroom lighting with a controlled rim light on the body edges and stand hinge
Color palette: graphite black, cool silver highlights, neutral gray background
Materials/textures: brushed CNC aluminum, smooth matte stand, glossy display glass
Text (verbatim): "CNC Aluminum Body\n12mm Slim Profile\nLarge Stable Stand"
Constraints: keep the product proportion accurate to 355 x 228 x 12 mm; emphasize thinness without making the screen look small
Avoid: cluttered props, warm orange lighting, exaggerated reflections that hide the body shape

scenes.label: IMG-03 移动办公双屏
scenes.objective: 用双屏办公场景突出 16:10 和 2.5K 的生产力价值。
scenes.headline: 16:10 2.5K Productivity Display
scenes.subheadline: More vertical space for code, sheets and multitasking
compliance: 场景道具不能压过屏幕
copyLines: 左侧搭配 15 英寸笔记本，避免把显示器显得过小。
屏幕内容要展示代码和表格纵向空间。
renderHints: 自然光偏暖，屏幕 UI 偏冷，拉出办公氛围层次。
键盘鼠标只做辅助，不要铺满桌面。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon lifestyle feature image
Primary request: show a 16-inch portable monitor as a premium second screen for office productivity
Scene/backdrop: modern desk setup with a premium laptop, wireless keyboard and mouse, soft daylight from the side
Subject: 16-inch portable monitor paired with a 15-inch laptop in a dual-screen work setup
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D lifestyle render
Composition/framing: medium-wide desk shot; monitor slightly right of center; laptop on the left; clear header space above
Lighting/mood: bright productive daylight with clean premium mood
Color palette: black hardware, walnut desk, soft silver laptop, cool blue UI accents
Materials/textures: brushed metal monitor body, crisp IPS panel, realistic desk grain
Text (verbatim): "16:10 2.5K Productivity Display\nMore vertical space for code, sheets and multitasking"
Constraints: make the external monitor visually dominant but believable; show extra vertical workspace on screen; keep scene uncluttered
Avoid: gaming RGB setup, excessive bokeh, messy cables, tiny unreadable screen content

override.cameraDistance: medium-wide hero framing with enough breathing room for a 16-inch panel and large stand
override.pairedDevice: 15-inch business laptop with single-cable USB-C workflow

scenes.label: IMG-04 144Hz 游戏娱乐场景
scenes.objective: 突出 144Hz、400 nits 和 IPS 色彩，服务游戏与娱乐用户。
scenes.headline: 144Hz Smooth Gameplay
scenes.subheadline: Fast refresh. Bright IPS color. Console-ready.
compliance: 主体外形仍需完整可见

appearance.backdrop: radial-gradient(circle at 16% 18%, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.22), transparent 24%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 22%, rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.18), transparent 18%), linear-gradient(160deg, #06111c 0%, #091927 40%, #1b2333 100%)

copyLines: 游戏画面可以有速度线，但别把屏幕面板做成拖影。
掌机只做连接提示，不是主角。
renderHints: 让画面亮度集中在屏幕中上区域，机身轮廓光保持干净。
环境光偏冷，赛道高光偏暖，形成速度冲突感。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon gaming feature image
Primary request: create a dynamic 3D scene that sells the 144Hz gaming capability of a 16-inch portable monitor
Scene/backdrop: dark premium gaming desk with subtle ambient lighting and a connected handheld console
Subject: 16-inch black portable monitor showing a vivid high-speed racing game, with a handheld console placed in the lower-right foreground
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D advertising render
Composition/framing: monitor occupies the main focus; console acts as a secondary anchor; strong forward energy in the frame
Lighting/mood: high-contrast cinematic lighting with bright screen emphasis and subtle edge lights on the body
Color palette: black body, blue and cyan highlights, vivid warm-red racing accents on screen
Materials/textures: metal body, glossy display, realistic controller plastic and screen reflections
Text (verbatim): "144Hz Smooth Gameplay\nFast refresh. Bright IPS color. Console-ready."
Constraints: show motion and performance without motion blur hiding the panel; keep the monitor body visible; make the screen appear bright but not clipped
Avoid: cartoon visuals, excessive neon clutter, fake transparent body elements, exaggerated sci-fi props

override.cameraDistance: dynamic medium-close framing that emphasizes screen brightness and motion without hiding the slim body
override.pairedDevice: handheld console or Switch-style device placed to the lower right of the monitor
override.screenContent: high-frame-rate action racing or shooter gameplay with strong contrast, vivid HUD and visible motion energy

scenes.label: IMG-05 便携出行场景
scenes.objective: 证明 16 寸依然便携，重点传达 760g 和 12mm。
scenes.headline: 16 Inches, Still Travel-Ready
compliance: 配件和道具是辅助角色
copyLines: 道具只说明“可带出门”，不要让人误解为超迷你设备。
包、护照、手机半入镜即可。
renderHints: 木桌和皮革/织物材质对比要明显。
屏幕内容保持轻办公，不要和游戏图重复。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon portability feature image
Primary request: show that a 16-inch portable monitor can still be travel-friendly and light enough for mobile work
Scene/backdrop: stylish coffee shop table with a backpack, phone, passport and USB-C cable nearby
Subject: slim black 16-inch portable monitor open on a cafe table, styled as a portable work companion
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D lifestyle render
Composition/framing: monitor remains the main subject; travel props support the story without overwhelming the frame
Lighting/mood: warm natural cafe daylight with clean, realistic shadows
Color palette: matte black hardware, warm wood tones, soft beige travel props, cool UI screen accents
Materials/textures: metal body, woven backpack fabric, glass tabletop or sealed wood surface, realistic cable materials
Text (verbatim): "16 Inches, Still Travel-Ready\n760g lightweight body | 12mm slim metal design"
Constraints: keep the product looking premium and portable, not tiny; props must feel realistic and secondary; use a clean single-cable setup
Avoid: overcrowded cafe background, travel props covering the screen, unrealistic folded geometry, childish colors

override.cameraDistance: medium framing that keeps the 16-inch monitor portable-looking instead of oversized
override.propsLayout: coffee shop table with backpack, passport, smartphone, notebook and USB-C cable

scenes.label: IMG-06 全接口与一线连接
scenes.objective: 减少下单前疑虑，直观看清 Mini HDMI、双 USB-C 和 3.5mm。
scenes.headline: Mini HDMI + Dual USB-C + Audio
scenes.subheadline: Easy connection for laptop, console and phone workflows
copyLines: 端口切口需要真实，避免做成概念机风格。
callout 走精简技术图，而不是爆炸图。
renderHints: 接口区域的边缘光要足够锐利。
可以单独抬高侧边局部高光，加强加工精度感。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon infographic feature image
Primary request: create a clean 3D detail render that explains the full connectivity of a 16-inch portable monitor
Scene/backdrop: minimalist dark-to-light gradient background with technical callout space
Subject: close-up of the side profile of the monitor showing Mini HDMI, full-function USB-C, power USB-C and 3.5mm audio jack
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D technical product render
Composition/framing: tight side-angle crop on the port area with clean callout leader lines and text zones
Lighting/mood: precise studio detail lighting with clear edge highlights and visible port depth
Color palette: black metal body, neutral gray background, subtle cyan callout accents
Materials/textures: brushed metal, sharp chamfers, realistic cutouts and connector edges
Text (verbatim): "Mini HDMI + Dual USB-C + Audio\nEasy connection for laptop, console and phone workflows"
Constraints: keep port ordering accurate to the product spec; maintain realistic scale and spacing; use premium, minimal callouts
Avoid: overly busy exploded view, inaccurate connector shapes, glowing fantasy ports, cluttered annotation design

scenes.label: IMG-07 VESA 与影音补充卖点
scenes.objective: 补齐 VESA 和双扬声器，建立办公、影音、安装扩展三合一认知。
scenes.headline: VESA Mount Ready
scenes.subheadline: 75 x 75 mm support · Built-in dual speakers
copyLines: 后壳不能过于花哨，重点是孔位、支架和声学补充信息。
右侧信息块数量控制在两组以内。
renderHints: 背部表面反射更柔和，避免抢掉孔位细节。
VESA 区域和支架连接区域要有清晰结构关系。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon feature image
Primary request: highlight the VESA mounting support and built-in dual speakers of a 16-inch portable monitor
Scene/backdrop: premium neutral studio background with infographic-style layout zones
Subject: rear three-quarter view of the monitor showing the stand structure and VESA mounting area, supported by small secondary usage insets
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D commercial render
Composition/framing: rear product view on the left, clean feature blocks on the right, balanced for easy reading
Lighting/mood: crisp neutral studio lighting with edge highlights on the rear shell and stand details
Color palette: black and graphite body tones, muted gray background, restrained blue accent graphics
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum rear shell, precise mount holes, matte support surfaces
Text (verbatim): "VESA Mount Ready\n75 x 75 mm support | Built-in dual speakers"
Constraints: keep the layout premium and sparse; do not overcomplicate the inset graphics; show the rear design clearly
Avoid: low-detail rear shell, random screws, cluttered exploded view, speaker grilles that contradict the real product
